tasks.subject: Task 1: statusline_render::cache - pure OpenAI-cost cache primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A network-free, atomically-persisted, key-fingerprinted OpenAI-cost cache with freshness + negative-cooldown predicates and a `BALANZE_CACHE_DIR_OVERRIDE`-aware path resolver.

**Files:** crates/statusline_render/src/cache.rs (create), src/lib.rs (pub mod cache), Cargo.toml (+directories/serde/serde_json; dev tempfile)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- envelope OpenAiCostEntry round-trips
- read -> None on missing/parse/fp-mismatch; Some only on matching fp
- is_fresh requires value + <300s (OPENAI_TTL_SECS)
- in_cooldown <60s (NEGATIVE_COOLDOWN_SECS)
- write_success/write_failure atomic (tmp+rename), no .tmp; failure preserves prior value
- cache_dir_path honors BALANZE_CACHE_DIR_OVERRIDE/statusline else ProjectDirs.cache/statusline
- key_fingerprint stable FNV-1a hex, never the key

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render cache

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/src/cache.rs", "crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs", "crates/statusline_render/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render cache", "acceptanceCriteria": ["envelope round-trips", "read None on missing/parse/fp-mismatch", "is_fresh value+<300s", "in_cooldown <60s", "write_* atomic no tmp", "cache_dir_path override else ProjectDirs.cache", "key_fingerprint stable, never the key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: CrossProvider per-cell staleness (codex_stale / openai_stale)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace CrossProvider.stale: bool with independent codex_stale + openai_stale so the warning marker is honest per segment (local Codex always current on self-compose; D6).

**Files:** crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs (struct + 2 marker sites + tests), crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs (cross_from_payload + test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CrossProvider has codex_stale + openai_stale, no stale
- codex marker uses codex_stale; openai_cost marker uses openai_stale
- cross_from_payload sets both to age > SNAPSHOT_FRESHNESS_SECS
- all prior statusline_render + balanze_cli tests pass after rename

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render -p balanze_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/src/render.rs", "crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["codex_stale+openai_stale, no stale", "per-cell markers", "cross_from_payload sets both", "prior tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CrossSources trait + cache-gated self_compose orchestrator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Network-free orchestrator building a CrossProvider from a CrossSources trait - Codex direct, OpenAI gated through the Task 1 cache (stale-while-updating + negative cooldown) - whose once-per-300s gate is proven with a counting fake.

**Files:** crates/statusline_render/src/self_compose.rs (create), src/lib.rs (mod + re-export); dev-dep tokio (macros, rt)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- CrossSources trait: async fetch_openai_total_micro_usd -> Result<Option<i64>,String>; codex_used_percent -> Option<f32>
- self_compose<S>(sources, cache_dir, fingerprint, now) -> CrossProvider
- fresh cache -> no fetch; stale+no-cooldown -> exactly one fetch (success/None/Err branches); cooldown -> no fetch serve stale
- two calls within 300s -> <=1 fetch (counter)
- codex every call; codex_stale always false
- crate has NO anthropic_oauth/openai_client/codex_local dep (trait abstracts I/O; 5.4)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p statusline_render self_compose

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/statusline_render/src/self_compose.rs", "crates/statusline_render/src/lib.rs", "crates/statusline_render/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p statusline_render self_compose", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CrossSources trait", "self_compose signature", "fresh->no fetch", "stale->one fetch branches", "cooldown->no fetch", "<=1 fetch per 300s", "codex every call, codex_stale false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: LiveCrossSources I/O adapter in balanze_cli
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real CrossSources impl - Codex via codex_local, OpenAI via short-timeout costs_this_month with OAuth-free key resolution extracted for reuse - plus a BALANZE_OPENAI_API_BASE test seam. Never touches the Anthropic OAuth path (5.4).

**Files:** crates/balanze_cli/src/sources.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- resolve_openai_key() (BALANZE_OPENAI_KEY trimmed else keychain) reused by live_fetch_openai (unchanged behavior)
- LiveCrossSources impls CrossSources: codex map (primary.used_percent as f32, None on Ok(None)/error); fetch -> Ok(None)/Ok(Some(total_micro_usd))/Err via 3s-timeout reqwest + BackoffPolicy::fail_fast()
- BALANZE_OPENAI_API_BASE seam (openai_api_base())
- no OAuth path reached
- cargo build -p balanze_cli succeeds; existing behavior unchanged

**Verify:** cargo build -p balanze_cli && cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/src/sources.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p balanze_cli && cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolve_openai_key extracted+reused", "LiveCrossSources impls CrossSources (codex + 3s fail_fast openai)", "BALANZE_OPENAI_API_BASE seam", "no OAuth path", "builds, behavior intact"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire self-compose into statusline_cross_provider()
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restructure the cross-provider resolver to the locked precedence - fresh snapshot wins; else self-compose (one-shot runtime + key fingerprint); else stale snapshot (never-blank); else Claude-only - keeping cmd_statusline synchronous.

**Files:** crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- fresh snapshot (age <= SNAPSHOT_FRESHNESS_SECS) used directly, no runtime/network
- absent/stale -> self-compose via one-shot Runtime + LiveCrossSources, keyed by key_fingerprint(resolve_openai_key) + cache_dir_path
- pure pick_cross(composed, stale_snapshot): composed-with-cells wins else snapshot else None - unit-tested 4 ways
- self_compose_cross None (no panic) when no cache dir / runtime fails
- Claude segments unaffected; absent-snapshot test still None in CI

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/src/statusline.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fresh snapshot short-circuit no runtime/network", "absent/stale -> self-compose runtime+fingerprint+cache dir", "pick_cross unit-tested 4 ways", "self_compose_cross None no panic", "absent-snapshot test still None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Self-compose integration test + documentation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A subprocess integration test proving self-compose renders a cross-provider line with no snapshot and gates the OpenAI fetch to once per 300s, plus the doc updates the change requires.

**Files:** crates/balanze_cli/tests/integration_statusline_self_compose.rs (create), docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, AGENTS.md, docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- subprocess test (assert_cmd) with empty BALANZE_DATA_DIR_OVERRIDE, temp BALANZE_CACHE_DIR_OVERRIDE, BALANZE_OPENAI_API_BASE -> wiremock, BALANZE_OPENAI_KEY set: line contains OpenAI $ via self-compose
- wiremock .expect(1): two renders within TTL -> one fetch (3.1 gate)
- ARCHITECTURE documents self-compose path + <cache>/statusline/openai-cost.json + BALANZE_CACHE_DIR_OVERRIDE + 3.1 gate + no-OAuth
- AGENTS 3.1 notes statusline gate via 300s cache + 3s timeout, no OAuth
- TROUBLESHOOTING entry added
- no em-dash/ellipsis (3.5)

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli --test integration_statusline_self_compose; full workspace nextest + clippy + fmt --check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/balanze_cli/tests/integration_statusline_self_compose.rs", "docs/ARCHITECTURE.md", "AGENTS.md", "docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo nextest run -p balanze_cli --test integration_statusline_self_compose", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subprocess test renders OpenAI $ via self-compose", "wiremock .expect(1) two renders one fetch", "ARCHITECTURE cache artifact+override+gate+no-OAuth", "AGENTS 3.1 note", "TROUBLESHOOTING entry", "no em-dash/ellipsis"]}
```
